pageContext.name: Demon King (Bronze Version)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Manas SUM are excited to present the Demon King (Bronze Version) Statue!  Standing at 4.72' tall, this statue is part of Manas SUM's Mythology collection and is made out of bronze. With only 300 pieces, you don't want to miss your chance to add this fine art collectible to your collection today!
